info.english_meaning: to seize to catch to steal
info.hindI_arTa: grahaRa karanA pakaq0a lenA haraRa karanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' A svadaH sakarmakAt ' (ga.sU. 201) - ita AraBya AsvadIyAH sakarmakAH jYeyAH ityarTaH  ' asya DAtoH AsvadIyatvena ' A svadaH sakarmakAt ' iti vacanAt karmasaMjYakArTAnvayaboDakatve eva Ric Bavati  akarmakatve tu na iti boDyam ' iti kfdantarUpamAlA  grAsayati Palam
